Discover the revitalizing power of ginseng and snail mucin in this luxurious serum from Beauty of Joseon. Formulated to revitalize and rejuvenate the skin, this serum is perfect for those looking to achieve a smoother, brighter complexion.

Key Benefits & Ingredients:

This serum is enriched with:

  • Ginseng: Known for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, ginseng helps to soothe and calm the skin.
  • Snail Mucin: Rich in glycoproteins and glycolic acid, snail mucin helps to exfoliate and regenerate the skin.

How to Use:

  1. Cleanse your face with a gentle cleanser.
  2. Apply a few drops of the Revive Serum to your face, gently massaging it into your skin.

The Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Ampoule is a concentrated serum that has gained immense popularity in the K-beauty world. This potent formula harnesses the power of Centella Asiatica, an herb traditionally used in skincare to promote skin elasticity and firmness.

As a key ingredient, Centella Asiatica helps to improve skin texture, reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, and soothe irritation. Its antioxidant properties also protect the skin from environmental stressors and damage caused by free radicals.

What sets this ampoule apart is its high concentration of Centella Asiatica extract, which is rich in vitamins and minerals that nourish and revitalize the skin. Regular use can lead to a more even-toned, radiant complexion and a smoother skin texture.

MEDICUBE Collagen Jelly Cream 110ml Description

This Collagen Jelly Cream by Medicube is a rich and nourishing moisturizer that provides long-lasting hydration to dry and dull skin. Its unique jelly texture glides smoothly onto the skin, leaving a non-greasy finish and a radiant glow.

Key Benefits & Ingredients

The cream is infused with collagen and other key ingredients that work together to improve skin elasticity, reduce fine lines and wrinkles, and leave the skin feeling soft and supple. The main active ingredients include:

  • Collagen: Improves skin elasticity and firmness
  • Hyaluronic Acid: Locks in moisture and hydrates the skin
  • Glycerin: Helps to retain moisture and soothe dry skin
  • Peptide: Stimulates collagen production and improves skin texture

How to Use

  1. Cleanse your face thoroughly before applying the cream
  2. Apply a small amount of the cream to your face and neck
  3. Gently massage the cream into your skin until fully absorbed

53306:
Korean skincare has always been a favorite among beauty enthusiasts, and after testing numerous products, we’re excited to introduce the "ANUA Heartleaf 77% Soothing Toner 250ml" to our catalog. This lightweight and hydrating toner, Korean product, is formulated with 77% heartleaf extract to soothe, tone, and balance your skin’s pH level. Perfect for Dhaka’s humidity, pollution, and heat, this toner is a must-have for anyone looking to achieve calm and hydrated skin. The Emart team has personally verified its authenticity and effectiveness.

Why Choose This Product?

First, the ANUA Heartleaf Toner is incredibly soothing. Its high concentration of heartleaf extract helps reduce redness and irritation, making it ideal for sensitive or acne-prone skin. Whether you’re dealing with the effects of pollution or sun exposure, this toner provides instant relief and comfort. Second, it hydrates without feeling heavy. In Dhaka’s hot and humid climate, finding a product that moisturizes without clogging pores can be a challenge. This toner absorbs quickly, leaving your skin refreshed and balanced. It’s perfect for layering under your daily skincare routine or makeup. Third, it helps restore your skin’s natural pH balance. Overwashing or exposure to harsh environmental factors can disrupt your skin’s pH, leading to dryness or breakouts. This toner gently tones your skin, ensuring it stays healthy and resilient throughout the day.

Key Ingredients

The star ingredient is heartleaf extract, known for its calming and anti-inflammatory properties. It soothes irritated skin and helps reduce redness, making it perfect for sensitive skin types. The toner also contains glycerin, a humectant that draws moisture into the skin, keeping it hydrated and soft. Lastly, panthenol (pro-vitamin B5) strengthens the skin barrier, helping it retain moisture and protect against environmental stressors.

How to Use It

Start by cleansing your face thoroughly to remove any dirt or impurities. Pour a small amount of the ANUA Heartleaf Toner onto a cotton pad or your palms. Gently pat or swipe it across your face, focusing on areas that need extra attention. Follow up with your favorite serum and moisturizer for maximum hydration and protection. Use it twice daily, morning and night, for best results. With its lightweight formula and soothing properties, the ANUA Heartleaf 77% Soothing Toner is a skincare essential for everyone. Whether you’re dealing with dryness, irritation, or just want to maintain healthy skin, this product delivers. Available for COD and delivered to Dhaka in 1-2 days, and nationwide in 3-5 days, it’s 100% authentic Korean product. Add it to your skincare routine today and experience the difference!
